description_long: This object is a shotgun with a classic design, featuring a wooden full stock and fore-end, and a metallic barrel and receiver. The stock is robust and angular, with a slightly tapered butt for shoulder support. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a front sight post and a visible magazine protruding below the receiver. The receiver area includes a metallic bolt and a trigger guard, with a small lever or safety catch on the side. The overall finish is utilitarian, with a matte wood texture and dark metallic components, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic shotgun with a wooden full stock, long metallic barrel, and a visible magazine beneath the receiver. The design is utilitarian with a matte wood and dark metal finish.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel and front sight post, with the stock and receiver aligned behind.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and the protruding magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the angular butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver are visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile shows the same features as view 1, with the bolt and safety catch more visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
